title: Blaze bridge fixer RP
description: Changes the Blaze model to a construction worker who loves fixing bridges!
body:
##  Blaze Bridge Fixer

This pack adds a funny and memey model and texture to the blaze.
He expresses his love for fixing bridges and he's well equipped for the job.
His home, the nether fortress is littered with destroyed and broken down bridges, so hes sure to live a happy life.

I hope you enjoy this niche and funny resourcepack as much as i did creating it :)

-Gogo

Special thanks to FreshLX for creating the animation!!!
